issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in instructions and examples.
Installation instructions only cover Linux and macOS, lacking Windows support.
Binary download via curl without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Build a memory-efficient concurrent web scraper for 500+ pages on a small VM
scenarios.rationale: Treatment starts lightpanda on host 127.0.0.1 port 9222, connects Puppeteer via browserWSEndpoint ws://127.0.0.1:9222, reuses one browser connection across pages, waits on domcontentloaded only, and bounds concurrency; baseline launches Puppeteer with full Chromium, which contradicts the resource-constrained goal.

scenarios.name: Headless browsing backend for an LLM scraping pipeline that needs minimal CPU
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Playwright's connect_over_cdp to http://127.0.0.1:9222, navigates with wait_until=domcontentloaded, strips script/style/nav before extracting innerText, and acknowledges no-screenshot/CSS limits; baseline reaches for Playwright with bundled Chromium and misses the CDP-attach pattern entirely.
